title: Mould King V8 Engine Building Blocks Set, 2250 PCS Combustion Engine Model Kit That Runs, Mini Engine for Adults with Battery, Engineering Construction STEM Toy for Boys Girls
features: 【V8 ENGINE SCALE MODEL】This model building block kit compatible with mainstream building blocks, based on the prototype of V8 Engine, as a total of 2250 + pieces bricks.

【REALISTIC MODEL THAT WORKS】 Mould King 10182 V8 Engine set contains many realistic details. Such as simulate piston motion, turbocharger and refined exhaust system. Designed specifically for race car fans. The perfect gift for car lovers and future engineers!

【Transparent Cylinder Head Design】This product is powered by the battery and reproduces the dynamic principle for you 1:1. Through the transparent cylinder cover, the movement of the piston can be observed.

【Premium Quality Material】Mould King Model Engine Kits made from child-friendly ABS materials and tested for quality control to ensure compliance with child safety standards. No smell, no burr, smooth and eco-friendly. You can assemble with confidence and safety.

【STEM Engine Toy】Mould King building sets are the best for kids to recreate scenes from the dream up their own original stories. And it is a good collection. For any occasion such as New Years Day, Christmas, Birthday, Childrens Day, Easter, Halloween, Chanukkah, STEM, Summer Camp Activities, Back To School.
description: Product Description Mould King 10182 MOC Eight-Cylinder Engine Building Kit - 2250 PCS V8 Engine Model - Build Your Own Engine That Works, explore the mysteries under the hood of the car! Racing Fans Gift Impressive build for racing fans. Give rewarding building experience for racing lovers. Easy to Assemble It comes with 2250 pieces which are sorted in different bags, making it very easy to use. With a step-by-step guide, you'll find an easier way to enjoy the pleasurable process. Previous page Mould King Engine Series Transparent Cylinder Head Mould King Engine Series Twin-Turbo Engine Mould King Engine Series Precision-Designed Piston Next page 1 Transparent Cylinder Head 2 Twin-Turbo Engine 3 Precision-Designed Piston
